title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Join the Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises family as a Teacher in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises:
Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises!
